questions.q: Who designed Barcelona's Sagrada Família, still under construction a century after his death?

The Barcelona Pavilion, designed by Ludwig Mies van der Rohe for the 1929 World's Fair, was reconstructed in 1986 using materials that most closely matched the original design. What distinctive structural feature defines its interior spaces?
choices: Free-flowing open spaces with minimal partitions
